name: Froglet
description: Public Froglet discovery, provider, and optional local runtime tools for OpenClaw.

marketplaceUrl.description: Base URL for the Froglet marketplace, for example http://127.0.0.1:9090.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for marketplace and provider requests.

defaultSearchLimit.description: Default marketplace search size when the tool caller omits a limit.

maxSearchLimit.description: Hard ceiling applied to marketplace search limits.

enablePrivilegedRuntimeTools.description: Register optional local runtime buy, payment-intent, accept-result, and publish tools.

providerUrl.description: Default public Froglet provider base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8080.

runtimeUrl.description: Default Froglet runtime base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8081.

runtimeAuthTokenPath.description: Default Froglet runtime auth token path, for example /absolute/path/to/data/runtime/auth.token.

pythonExecutable.description: Python command used to run the public Froglet runtime bridge.
